reviews.review_description: For myself (adult) this game/app comes across boring as its just animals running around in an area you can walk around and nothing like a zoo. However, if your target audience is a 2-5 year old then it will keep them entertained for a short period of time.
Very good app to see animals up close and personal. My daughter loves it.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback. Enjoy the game.
